name: Pull-Up
resistance_profile: Full overhead stretch at the bottom; strong lat loader.
execution_steps: Grip the bar slightly wider than shoulder width, palms facing away, and hang with arms fully extended.
Set your shoulders down and brace your core to stop swinging.
Drive your elbows down and in, pulling your chest toward the bar.
Lower under control back to a full dead hang.
good_when: You want a highly effective, equipment-light lat and back builder.
You can control your bodyweight and want to add loaded progression over time.
bad_when: You cannot yet complete strict reps, so start with assisted pull-ups or a lat pulldown.
You need precise, small load increments, which a machine makes easier to micro-load.
